nodes.title: It's so much that if you dont have a specific reason to go looking you probably shouldnt
It's one hell of a party, but also one hell of a thing to get hit in the lower back with
Someone at one point had an idea that the entire thing should fly, not like hey cool thats fly but literally fly in the sky
Like the others, we were created Perfect
Effective People Think in Simple Patterns
Legend has it that currently the entire thing is being circled by rivaling carpet cleaning companies
